tasks.label: Inspect thesis docx
tasks.command: cd '/Users/sepehrmortazavi/Desktop/Master thesis /POC_version1' && pip install python-docx -q && python3 document/inspect_docx.py

tasks.label: Inspect docx styles inline
tasks.command: /opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniconda/base/bin/python3 -c "from docx import Document; doc = Document('docs/wiki/Base--File.docx'); styles={}; [styles.update({p.style.name: p.text.strip()[:60]}) for p in doc.paragraphs if p.text.strip()]; [print(k, '->', v) for k,v in sorted(styles.items())]; print('---HEADINGS---'); [print(i, p.style.name, p.text.strip()[:80]) for i,p in enumerate(doc.paragraphs) if 'Heading' in p.style.name and p.text.strip()]; print('TOTAL', len(doc.paragraphs))"
